Hard scope constraint conflicts with spec requirement. Spec requires new "enum DueStatus" with signature (overdue(days:), dueToday, due(inDays:), unscheduled) and label property with format "Overdue 1d"/"Due in 5d"/"No schedule". Existing PlantListViewModel.DueStatus uses conflicting signature (due(days:)) and old label format ("Overdue by 1 day", "Due in 3 days"). Both enums compile into same module → redeclaration error. Scope gate (Sources/DesignSystem/**, Tests/** only) prevents removing/renaming old enum in PlantListViewModel, PlantDetailViewModel, or updating references in PlantListView/HomeView/ContentView. Prerequisite task needed to extract old DueStatus to a legacy location first, or scope must expand to v1 code layer.
